name: files
title: Files
description: File metadata; bytes live outside collections and are served by /api/files/{id} under this record's visibility.

fields.name: task_id
fields.label: Task
fields.help: Optional attachment link into app-tasks' tasks collection -- a soft reference only, like tasks.json's own template_id -> templates (no install-order dependency declared). Lets a task detail page compose its attached files via a plain 59 `related` block ({"collection": "files", "fk_field": "task_id"}) -- files have independent identity/lifecycle (uploaded, downloaded, shared on their own), so this is a true related child, not document-composition.

fields.name: is_public
fields.label: Public
fields.help: Public files are downloadable by anyone with the link
